title: ProtocolLab Public Report Contract
purpose: Define the canonical public report payload and supporting publication metadata for ProtocolLab report bundles stored in R2.
scope: This specification covers public report JSON payload semantics, schema versioning, measurements, evidence, logs and artifacts, failure diagnostics, and the D1 derived-index boundary. It does not define private raw run retention, hosted execution, or commercial attestation policy.
context: ProtocolLab publishes public-safe report bundles to R2 under public/runs/{runId}/. The site and other consumers need a stable shareable JSON contract that carries the complete report semantics, while D1 remains a lossy searchable index derived from that payload.

requirements.title: Canonical public payload
requirements.statement: The publication workflow MUST include exactly one schema-versioned canonical public evidence report JSON payload that carries the report semantics for each published ProtocolLab run.

requirements.title: Protocol-neutral cell coverage
requirements.statement: The canonical public evidence report MUST represent every included result cell without assuming a specific protocol family, scenario family, target implementation, load tool, or execution backend.

requirements.title: General measurement model
requirements.statement: The canonical public evidence report MUST encode measurements as named, sourced, unit-bearing values so throughput, latency, quantity, memory, CPU, network, diagnostic, protocol, and future custom measurements can share the same shape.

requirements.title: Failure diagnostics
requirements.statement: The canonical public evidence report MUST preserve validation status, benchmark execution status, warnings, errors, and public-safe artifact references for cells that fail, are unsupported, are skipped, or do not produce parsed measurements.

requirements.title: Supporting metadata boundary
requirements.statement: The publication workflow MUST treat publication manifest, artifact index, registry JSON, and D1 rows as derived supporting metadata that do not redefine claim level, validation outcome, benchmark acceptance, or measurement semantics independently of the canonical public evidence report.

requirements.title: Schema validation gate
requirements.statement: The publication workflow MUST produce public report JSON files that validate against the repository-owned public report JSON schemas before those files are treated as publishable R2 payloads.

requirements.title: Benchmark-run bundle production
requirements.statement: The benchmark run workflow MUST produce the schema-validated public report bundle as part of each benchmark run without requiring R2 upload or D1 writes.
